SpTU 1, 063 [recipes][via cams/gkab]

unidentified
unidentifiedunidentified NaN  (start of surface missing)
unidentified 1'unidentified 1'

GUR₂.GUR₂ LI x (x) [...] x (x) [...]

kukuru-tree, juniper ... [...] ... [...]

unidentified 2'2'

NUMUN GADA u₂!BAR₈sar NUMUN KUR.ZI ṣa-ṣum-tu₂

linseed, grass, seeds of samēdu-plant, ṣaṣumtu-plant

unidentified 3'3'

MUG ŠE.SA.A ḪAB MUNU₄ GAZIsar saḫ-le₂-e SUMUN.⸢DAR⸣

aromatic substance from the ballukku-tree, parched grain, opopanax, malt, mustard, cress, šumuttu-plant

unidentified 4'4'

ur₂-ne₂-e KUR.RA ḪAR.SAG zi-bu-u ḪAR.ḪAR NU.⸢LUḪ⸣.[ḪA]

mint, nīnû-plant, saffron, black cumin, thyme, nuhurtu-asafoetida

unidentified 5'5'

SIM GABA.RI ZI₃!(KI) NU.LUḪ.ḪA U₂.NAM.DIN A.ZAL.⸢LA₂⸣

sieved, ..., flour of nuhurtu-asafoetida, life-plant, azallû-plant

unidentified 6'6'

GEŠTIN.KA₅.A NAGA.SI ZU₂.LUM.MA MUN KUŠ₈.LAGAB

fox-vine, salicornia, dates, salt, colocynth.

unidentified 7'7'

⸢PAP 32⸣ U₂-ME ŠEŠ-ME ina 1(BAN₂) 1 SILA₃ A NIG₂.AR₃.RA ŠEG₆šal

You cook all these 32 plants in 1 sūtu (and) 1 qû of mundu-water

unidentified 8'8'

EN 1 NINDA GUR I₃ ana IGI ŠUB ana TAB.U₄.DA TU₁₅ u ELLAG₂-ME SIG₅iq1

until it reduces to 1 akalu (and then) you pour oil on the surface. It is good for heat stroke, flatulence and the kidneys.

unidentified 9'9'

* NA ELLAG₂-šu₂ GU₇-ME-šu₂ 1 SILA₃ GU₂.GAL sa-an-du-tu₂ ina ⸢A ŠEG₆⸣šal

If a person's kidneys hurt him, you cook 1 qû of milled peas in water

unidentified 10'10'

[...] x x RI ta-ša₂-ḫal I₃ ana IGI ŠUB x (x) [...] x x x x x [...]

[...] ... you filter (and then) you pour oil on the surface ... [...] ... [...]

unidentified 11'11'

[...] x [(x)] x [...]

[...] ... [...] ... [...]

(end surface missing)

1SIG₅{+iq} is written on the following ruling
